response.overview: ‘PARASITE’ is a short exploration of human conditioning through the medium of dance. A grain of sand in a world that only seems to be deteriorating, we continue through our everyday lives feeling fear and questioning our existence. War, climate change, greed. But at what cost, for what purpose? Often feeling caught in a casual dark nexus, we aim to search for a positive reality through what can only be seen as white noise.
response.title: PARASITE
